title: acis tingitana
intro: Acis tingitana, also known as the rock cyclamen or sea cyclamen, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It is a low-growing, perennial plant that thrives in dry, rocky areas and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain. Acis tingitana is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used in various herbal preparations, including tinctures and salves.
